title: sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. eynensis
intro: Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. eynensis is a plant species, also known as Spanish ironwort, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. eynensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
